# UDGOK — Upscale Development Group

> AI-Powered Medical & Dental Design-Build Construction

## About

Upscale Development Group (UDGOK) is a licensed Oklahoma general contractor specializing in healthcare and commercial Design-Build construction. Founded in 2015 and headquartered in Tulsa, Oklahoma, UDGOK delivers turnkey medical offices, dental clinics, oral surgery centers, eye clinics, and commercial facilities across Oklahoma and North Texas.

## Contact

- Website: https://udgok.com
- Email: projects@udgok.com
- Phone: (918) 520-3823
- Address: 7739 E 38th Street, Ste F, Tulsa, OK 74145
